items.title: Show HN: Atelier - open source, honest 30% savings on Claude code.
items.why_it_matters: You use Claude Code daily, and token costs add up fast. Atelier is an open-source tool designed to cut your Claude Code bill by 30% without losing quality. This week, you can clone the Atelier repo and run your next AI-ingest feature build through it to see if your token usage drops.

items.title: Show HN: Foreman, a self-hosted LLM gateway for cost aware model routing
items.why_it_matters: You previously saw massive savings by delegating simpler tasks to cheaper models like DeepSeek. Foreman is a self-hosted LLM gateway that handles cost-aware routing automatically. This week, you can spin up Foreman locally and configure your development environment to route basic debugging tasks to DeepSeek while saving Claude for complex logic.

items.title: Show HN: Abralo – Free, easy way to run several Claude Code agents in one window
items.why_it_matters: Managing multiple Claude Code agents in terminal splits can get messy and hard to track as your project grows. Abralo gives you a clean, free UI to run and monitor multiple Claude Code agents simultaneously. This week, try launching Abralo to run one agent on your Next.js frontend and another on your Supabase backend at the same time.

items.title: Stop Writing Claude.md Rules. Write Linting Rules Instead
items.why_it_matters: Instead of constantly writing and updating instructions for Claude in markdown files, this approach suggests using standard linting rules that your editor and AI can both read natively. This week, run your linter in your Next.js repo and have Claude Code fix the errors, setting a hard standard for your codebase without bloating your system prompts.

items.title: Show HN: Tilion – MCP for Claude Code to stop it getting blocked on the web
items.why_it_matters: Since you are building AI-ingest to filter news, your Claude Code agents will eventually need to fetch and read web pages without getting blocked by Cloudflare. Tilion is an MCP server built specifically to stop Claude from getting blocked on the web. This week, add the Tilion MCP to your Claude Code configuration to let it scrape live web sources for your ingest tool.
